REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3944 3948 18th Street, San Francisco, Ca 94114)
Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Barbara Devries.

The sale was confirmed at $1,075,000.00, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). An additonal bond in the amount of $1,208,000.00 is required.

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Sandra Petritsch CSR#11684. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
